title: uedelete
text: uedelete Close down the Uniface environment that was created by uecreate . long uedelete (UHACT hEnv , int how ); Parameters hEnv The Uniface environment handle that was returned by uecreate . how A value specifying how you want to shut down the environment. Valid values are: 1—Suspend Uniface session, clear screen, and return control of keyboard and screen to the 3GL application. 0—Suspend Uniface session and return control of keyboard to the 3GL application. -1—Terminate the Uniface session completely. Return Values Table 1. Values returned by uedelete Value Error constant Meaning 1 UINI_SUCCESS Success -1 UINI_LOAD_ERROR No environment ( uecreate was not called), or you supplied a zero handle. We recommend that you use the mnemonic values rather than the numeric values. For example, you should test for UINI_SUCCESS rather than for 1. While this may make your code slightly harder to debug, it improves readability and portability. Use Library: ucall Description uedelete shuts down the Uniface environment that was created by uecreate . By using the how parameter, you have some control over how exactly this happens. (Note that this is only interesting for character-mode applications, because a GUI application has no programmatic control over keyboard and screen.) We recommend that you always use the value -1 for how . Note that this function does not free the environment handle. This is not important if uedelete is the last thing you do in your program, but if you repeatedly call uecreate and uedelete , you should also free the environment handle after uedelete by calling ufreeh . By not doing so, you could cause a memory leak. Example: uecreate, uedelete, ufreeh, uinstdel, uinstnew, uinstopr, and uopract The following simple call-in program shows how to activate the EXEC operation of the service MYSVC. As usual, error checking has been omitted for the sake of brevity. Explain this code #include <h3gl.h> void main (void) { UHACT hEnv; /* Uniface environment */ UHACT hIn; /* Instance handle */ UHACT hOp; /* Operation handle */ long opStat; /* Activate status return parameter */ /* Create the environment */ uecreate(1, 0, 0, "my.asn", 0, 0, &hEnv); /* Instantiate service MYSVC */ uinstnew(hEnv, "MYSVC", 0, 0, UDEFAULT_COMM_MODE, 0, &hIn, 0); uinstopr(hIn, "EXEC", 0, &hOp); /* Instantiate the EXEC operation */ uopract (hOp, &opStat, 0); /* Activate the operation */ uinstdel(hIn, 0); /* Destroy the instance */ ufreeh (&hOp); /* Free the operation */ ufreeh (&hIn); /* Free the instance */ uedelete(hEnv, -1); /* Shut down the environment */ ufreeh (&hEnv); /* Free the environment handle */ return 0; // on success } Copy Was this topic helpful?
